mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kodik_content WHERE kinopoisk_id = #{kinopoiskId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM kodik_content WHERE title = #{title} AND year = #{year} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FROM kodik_content c INNER JOIN kodik_episode_variant ev ON c.id = ev.content_id WHERE ev.mp4_link IS NOT NULL AND c.updated_at > #{updatedSince}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kodik_content (kodik_id, type, title, title_orig, other_title, year, kinopoisk_id, imdb_id, shikimori_id, worldart_link, screenshots, material_data, kinopoisk_rating, imdb_rating, shikimori_rating, genres, blocked_countries, camrip, lgbt, last_season, last_episode, episodes_count, quality) VALUES (#{kodikId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{titleOrig}, #{otherTitle}, #{year}, #{kinopoiskId}, #{imdbId}, #{shikimoriId}, #{worldartLink}, #{screenshots}, #{materialData}, #{kinopoiskRating}, #{imdbRating}, #{shikimoriRating}, #{genres}, #{blockedCountries}, #{camrip}, #{lgbt}, #{lastSeason}, #{lastEpisode}, #{episodesCount}, #{quality})
mapper.update: UPDATE kodik_content SET kodik_id = #{kodikId}, type = #{type}, title = #{title}, title_orig = #{titleOrig}, other_title = #{otherTitle}, year = #{year}, kinopoisk_id = #{kinopoiskId}, imdb_id = #{imdbId}, shikimori_id = #{shikimoriId}, worldart_link = #{worldartLink}, screenshots = #{screenshots}, material_data = #{materialData}, kinopoisk_rating = #{kinopoiskRating}, imdb_rating = #{imdbRating}, shikimori_rating = #{shikimoriRating}, genres = #{genres}, blocked_countries = #{blockedCountries}, camrip = #{camrip}, lgbt = #{lgbt}, last_season = #{lastSeason}, last_episode = #{lastEpisode}, episodes_count = #{episodesCount}, quality = #{quality} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kodik_content (kodik_id, type, title, title_orig, other_title, year, kinopoisk_id, imdb_id, shikimori_id, worldart_link, screenshots, material_data, kinopoisk_rating, imdb_rating, shikimori_rating, genres, blocked_countries, camrip, lgbt, last_season, last_episode, episodes_count, quality) VALUES (#{kodikId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{titleOrig}, #{otherTitle}, #{year}, #{kinopoiskId}, #{imdbId}, #{shikimoriId}, #{worldartLink}, #{screenshots}, #{materialData}, #{kinopoiskRating}, #{imdbRating}, #{shikimoriRating}, #{genres}, #{blockedCountries}, #{camrip}, #{lgbt}, #{lastSeason}, #{lastEpisode}, #{episodesCount}, #{quality}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE kodik_id = VALUES(kodik_id), type = VALUES(type), title = VALUES(title), title_orig = VALUES(title_orig), other_title = VALUES(other_title), year = VALUES(year), imdb_id = VALUES(imdb_id), shikimori_id = VALUES(shikimori_id), worldart_link = VALUES(worldart_link), screenshots = VALUES(screenshots), material_data = COALESCE(VALUES(material_data), material_data), kinopoisk_rating = COALESCE(VALUES(kinopoisk_rating), kinopoisk_rating), imdb_rating = COALESCE(VALUES(imdb_rating), imdb_rating), shikimori_rating = COALESCE(VALUES(shikimori_rating), shikimori_rating), genres = COALESCE(VALUES(genres), genres), blocked_countries = COALESCE(VALUES(blocked_countries), blocked_countries), camrip = VALUES(camrip), lgbt = VALUES(lgbt), last_season = VALUES(last_season), last_episode = VALUES(last_episode), episodes_count = VALUES(episodes_count), quality = VALUES(quality), id = LAST_INSERT_ID(id)
mapper.select:
SELECT id, shikimori_id AS shikimoriId FROM kodik_content WHERE shikimori_id IN
#{sid}
